name: Can I settle my workers comp case early in Ogden?
description: Yes, but after max improvement, commission OK.[2]

mainEntity.name: Can I settle my workers comp case early in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but after max improvement, commission OK.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, via lump-sum settlement after max medical, approved by commission.[2] Key factors: Covers future medical? Rare full release. Practical guidance: Don't rush—get impairment rating first; attorney negotiates fair value. Revocable if changed conditions.
